organization.name: BMZ Group
organization.description: German battery pack integrator and manufacturer. Assembles lithium-ion battery systems using cells from various suppliers (historically Sony/Murata and TerraE among others).

editorial.note: Merged from bmz-sony and bmz-terrae. Canonical IRI from bmz-sony (phj1-pwnc-p544-99st). bmz-terrae IRI (2x8g-9z3w-grwe-5x8r) retired.
